prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: A full-body portrait of Sherlock Holmes, an extraordinarily handsome young man with striking masculine features. He has distinctive dark curly hair, a sharp aquiline nose, and penetrating deep-set eyes that convey intense intelligence. His face is remarkably handsome with delicate, refined features, clear pale skin, and a cold, analytical expression that exudes aristocratic elegance. His tall, lean physique is dressed in classic Victorian attire - a long dark cape coat over a formal suit, with his iconic deerstalker hat. He holds a magnifying glass in one hand and a smoking pipe in the other, embodying the quintessential consulting detective of 1890s London.

The composition shows him standing confidently in the center against a pure white background, his posture reflecting both intellectual superiority and noble bearing. His sharp, observant gaze seems to pierce through mysteries, while his overall appearance combines classical Victorian gentleman's refinement with an air of brilliant deduction.

Rendered in Impressionist oil painting style with rich light and shadow variations, visible brushstrokes creating atmospheric depth and artistic texture throughout the portrait.

Keywords: handsome, attractive, delicate features, clear skin, full-body, no text, no symbols, no words, Impressionist oil painting, Victorian era, detective, magnifying glass, deerstalker hat, cape coat, aristocratic bearing., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: oil_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
